case_title: JOHN WARREN MOON VS. ED ENG

docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO MAY-17-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-04-2021 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOON, JOHN WARREN (DAVE)
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED.
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOON, JOHN WARREN (DAVE) AS TO DEFENDANT ENG, ED
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED PER AGREEMENT ON MAY 17, 2021. NO APPEARANCES ARE MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REMARK: REMARK: EXHIBITS DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON NOVEMBER 8, 2024 PURSUANT TO SECTION 1952 OF THE CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE OF CALIFORNIA.

DECLARATION OF DEFENDANT, REGARDING FULL PAYMENT MADE TO PLAINTIFF PRIOR TO JULY 1, 2021 HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT ENG, ED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUL-01-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JOHN DAVID WARREN MOON IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT ED ENG IS PRESENT. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $194.50 TO THE PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JULY 1ST HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
